name: MITRE ATT&CK STIX Data index (FIXTURE: good / current)
description: Local fixture shaped like https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mitre-attack/attack-stix-data/master/index.json. Enterprise ATT&CK max version == the pinned 19.1, so the freshness check must return current/pass. A DECOY 'Mobile ATT&CK' collection with a HIGHER number (20.0) is listed FIRST to prove the comparator selects Enterprise — not collections[0], not the global max.

collections.name: Mobile ATT&CK
collections.description: DECOY: higher-numbered non-Enterprise collection, listed first. A comparator that took collections[0] or the global max would wrongly read this and flag stale.

collections.name: Enterprise ATT&CK
collections.description: The collection the check must select. Max of versions[] is 19.1 (note 19.1 is NOT last in the array, defeating a take-last shortcut).
